svg.title: Distributed Vector Database — Full Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: End-to-end architecture showing client apps, gRPC gateway, coordinator, three shards each with HNSW index, WAL, and mmap storage, plus the React monitoring dashboard.

g.text: Python SDK · REST bridge · gRPC-Web browser client
TLS termination · Auth (bearer token) · Rate limiter
Top-K merge · Circuit breaker · Retry logic
Beam search (ef_search candidates) · True ANN result here
Overview · Shard map · Search playground · Index inspector
recharts latency charts · D3 HNSW graph · gRPC-Web client
WebSocket feed — per-shard vector count, insert rate, WAL lag
